_comment_for_bruno: Drop this into ~/.claude/settings.local.json (it merges with whatever's already there).
After saving, restart Claude Code and start a new session. Within seconds the mind will see:
• A 'user_prompt' activity for each message you send
• A 'tool_<name>' activity for each tool call I make
• A 'session end' summary when the session closes
AND each new prompt will get a <shared-context> block prepended showing recent activity
from this and any other agent body. Egon must be open (Panop on :8000) for the hooks to do anything;
if Egon's closed, hooks silently no-op and your session is unaffected.
If you also want this for Codex (~/.codex/hooks.json) or Cursor (~/.cursor/hooks.json),
use the same `command` template — they share the same hook event names.
